name: Swedish Meat Ball Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat cooking oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
2. Mix together all remaining ingredients, except the sour cream and 1/2 teaspoon of salt, in a large bowl.
3. Form the mixture into appetizer-sized meat balls (about 1 inch in diameter).
4. Brown the meatballs on all sides in the cooking oil until fully cooked.
5. Remove the meatballs from the pan and drain on paper towels.
6. Pour off excess grease and let the pan cool slightly.
7. Add a small amount of sour cream to the browned meatballs and stir.
8. Add the remaining sour cream and 1/2 teaspoon of salt, stirring to blend.
9. Toss the meatballs in the sour cream mixture to coat evenly.
10. Place the meatballs in a chafing dish to serve warm. Do not boil. Makes 50 appetizer-sized meat balls.
